tools.name: run_tsql_query_tool
tools.description:
Execute a read-only T-SQL query against the configured Fabric lakehouse.

Parameters:
    query (str): The SELECT statement to execute. Destructive statements (DROP/DELETE/UPDATE/INSERT/ALTER/TRUNCATE) are blocked.
    max_rows (int, optional): Maximum number of rows to return. Defaults to 100. Use None to return all rows.

Returns:
    JSON string with shape {"rows": [...], "count": <int>} or an error payload {"error": "message"}

max_rows.description: Maximum number of rows to return. Defaults to 100.

tools.name: run_synapse_tsql_query_tool
tools.description:
Execute a read-only T-SQL query against the Synapse SQL (serverless) endpoint in workspace syn-ratio-airod-prod.

Parameters:
    query (str): The SELECT statement to execute. Destructive statements (DROP/DELETE/UPDATE/INSERT/ALTER/TRUNCATE) are blocked.
    max_rows (int, optional): Maximum number of rows to return. Defaults to 100. Use None to return all rows.

Returns:
    JSON string with shape {"rows": [...], "count": <int>} or an error payload {"error": "message"}

max_rows.description: Maximum number of rows to return. Defaults to 100.

tools.name: collect_root_cause_tool
tools.description:
Collect root-cause level outage data for a given incident identifier.

Parameters:
    incident_id (str | int): Incident id (numeric or string) used to query underlying dataset.

Returns:
    JSON string: {"rows": [...], "count": n} on success; {"error": "message"} on failure.

incident_id.description: Incident id (numeric or string) used to query underlying dataset.

tools.name: collect_impacted_resource_tool
tools.description:
Collect impacted resource entries for a service tree id in a UTC time window.

Constraints:
    * start_time and end_time must be ISO8601 timestamps.
    * end_time must be >= start_time.
    * Window size <= 30 days and start not older than 30 days from now.

Parameters:
    service_tree_id (str): Identifier of the service tree node.
    start_time (str): ISO8601 UTC start timestamp.
    end_time (str): ISO8601 UTC end timestamp.

Returns:
    JSON string: {"rows": [...], "count": n} or {"error": "message"}.

service_tree_id.description: Identifier of the service tree node.

tools.name: normalize_entity_mapping_tool
tools.description:
Normalize entity mapping fields (ServiceName, Offering, Region) using synonym datasets.

Parameters:
    entity_mapping (dict): Input mapping containing service/offering/region fields or variants.
    user_ask (str): Original user question/context to support model-based normalization heuristics.

Returns:
    JSON string with normalization result structure produced by normalize_entity_mapping(...).
    On error: {"error": "message"}.

entity_mapping.description: Input mapping containing service/offering/region fields or variants.

user_ask.description: Original user question/context to support model-based normalization heuristics.

tools.name: collect_impacted_resource_customer_tool
tools.description:
Collect SLI breach data for impacted resources filtered by service tree id and customer name.

Returns per-subscription/region/SLI aggregates: ImpactedResources, TotalImpactDurationMin, EarliestImpactStart, LatestImpactEnd, AvgValueAcrossWindows, MinValueAcrossWindows.

Parameters:
    service_tree_id (str): Identifier of the service tree node.
    customer_name (str): Customer name to filter subscriptions (matched against MSCustomerName).

Returns:
    JSON string: {"rows": [...], "count": n} or {"error": "message"}.

service_tree_id.description: Identifier of the service tree node.

customer_name.description: Customer name to filter subscriptions (matched against MSCustomerName).

tools.name: collect_customer_region_tool
tools.description:
Discover distinct regions where a customer has monitored resources for a given service.

Returns distinct CustomerName, Region pairs by scanning SLI monitoring data (all resources, not just impacted) joined with customer subscription data.

Parameters:
    service_tree_id (str): Identifier of the service tree node.
    customer_name (str): Customer name to filter subscriptions (matched against MSCustomerName).

Returns:
    JSON string: {"rows": [...], "count": n} or {"error": "message"}.

service_tree_id.description: Identifier of the service tree node.

customer_name.description: Customer name to filter subscriptions (matched against MSCustomerName).

tools.name: collect_impacted_resource_multicustomer_tool
tools.description:
Collect SLI breach data for impacted resources across all customers for a service tree id.

Returns per-region/SLI aggregates without customer filtering: ImpactedResources, ImpactedSubscriptions, TotalImpactDurationMin, EarliestImpactStart, LatestImpactEnd, AvgValueAcrossWindows, MinValueAcrossWindows.

Parameters:
    service_tree_id (str): Identifier of the service tree node.

Returns:
    JSON string: {"rows": [...], "count": n} or {"error": "message"}.

service_tree_id.description: Identifier of the service tree node.

tools.name: collect_incident_details_tool
tools.description:
Collect recent incident details from IcM for high-severity or confirmed-outage incidents.

Returns: IncidentId, Severity, IsOutage, Title, Status, CreateDate, ImpactStartDate, ChildCount, OwningTenantName, SupportTicketId.
Filters to Severity <= 2 or IsOutage == true, within the configured lookback window (default 4h) and owning tenant names (if provided).

Parameters:
    lookback_hours (str, optional): KQL timespan for the lookback window (e.g. '4h', '12h', '1d'). Defaults to '4h'.
    owning_tenant_names (str, optional): JSON array string of owning tenant names to filter (e.g. '["ScaleSet Platform and Solution"]'). If omitted or empty, returns all tenants.

Returns:
    JSON string: {"rows": [...], "count": n} or {"error": "message"}.

lookback_hours.description: KQL timespan for the lookback window (e.g. '4h', '12h', '1d'). Defaults to '4h'.

owning_tenant_names.description: JSON array string of owning tenant names to filter (e.g. '["ScaleSet Platform and Solution"]'). If empty array, returns all tenants.

tools.name: collect_support_request_tool
tools.description:
Collect recent support requests, optionally filtered by customer name, lookback window, and support product names.

Returns: CaseNumber, Title, State, IsCritSit, SupportProductName, ResourceUri, CreatedDateTime, IsEscalated, InitialSeverity, Severity, AzureSubscriptionId, Customer_CloudCustomerName.
Filters to the configured lookback window (default 4h) and support product names (if provided).

Parameters:
    customer_name (str, optional): Customer name to filter support cases (matched against Customer_CloudCustomerName). If omitted, returns support cases across all customers.
    lookback_hours (str, optional): KQL timespan for the lookback window (e.g. '4h', '12h', '1d'). Defaults to '4h'.
    support_product_names (str, optional): JSON array string of support product names to filter (e.g. '["Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS)"]'). If omitted or empty, returns all products.

Returns:
    JSON string: {"rows": [...], "count": n} or {"error": "message"}.

customer_name.description: Customer name to filter support cases (matched against Customer_CloudCustomerName). If omitted, returns support cases across all customers.

lookback_hours.description: KQL timespan for the lookback window (e.g. '4h', '12h', '1d'). Defaults to '4h'.

support_product_names.description: JSON array string of support product names to filter (e.g. '["Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS)"'). If empty array, returns all products.
